popularStory.headline: Piers Gaveston, 1st Earl of Cornwall (c. 1284-9 June 1312)
popularStory.description:
Piers Gaveston, 1st Earl of Cornwall (c. 1284-9 June 1312) was an English nobleman of Gascon origin, and the favourite of King Edward II of England.

At a young age he made a good impression on King E …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Piers Gaveston 1st Earl of Cornwall於1284年出生在法國貝阿時，他的父親Sir Arnaud de Gaveston37歲，母親Lady Clarmunda De Louvigny25歲。他於1307年11月1日與Margaret de Clare在英國賀特福爾貝可哈姆斯泰德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1312年6月19日在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克享年28歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾金也斯 明日香。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Piers Gaveston 1st Earl of Cornwall于1284年出生在法国貝阿时，他的父亲Sir Arnaud de Gaveston37岁，母亲Lady Clarmunda De Louvigny25岁。他于1307年11月1日与Margaret de Clare在英国賀特福爾貝可哈姆斯泰德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1312年6月19日在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克享年28岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾金也斯 明日香。

nameMeanings.name: Gaveston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: probably an altered form of   Graveson  , hypercorrecting the process seen in   Urmson   from Urmston, Lancs.

variants.name: Graveson
meanings: English: relationship name, ‘son of the steward, farm bailiff, or village headman’, largely confined to northern England. From the north Midlands through Yorks to the north-west, the source is Middle English greyve, grayve, greve, a borrowing of Old Scandinavian greifi, see Grave . In Durham and Northumb the source is Middle English greve, from Old (Northumbrian) English grǣfa, see Grieve . The two forms are difficult to tell apart, except that the post-medieval spelling Grieve- usually reflects the Northumbrian term. Pronunciation developments have sometimes obscured the origin of the name. Grayveson frequently lost the -v-, becoming Gra(y)son and Greeson; see Grayson .

variants.name: Grayson
meanings: English (northern): variant of Graveson, ‘son of the steward, farm bailiff, or village headman’. From the North Midlands through Yorkshire to the north-west, the source is Middle English grayve, grayve, greve, a borrowing of Old Norse greifi ‘earl, count’ (see Grave ). In Durham and Northumberland the source is Middle English greve, from Old (Northumbrian) English grǣfa with the same meaning (see Grieve ).
English: possibly a habitational name from Greysouthen (Cumbria), recorded as Graysone in 1505.

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Piers Gaveston 1st Earl of Cornwall was born in 1284, in Béarn, France, his father, Sir Arnaud de Gaveston, was 37 and his mother, Lady Clarmunda De Louvigny, was 25. He married Margaret de Clare on 1 November 1307, in Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 19 June 1312, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 28, and was buried in King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Piers Gaveston 1st Earl of Cornwall est né en 1284, à Béarn, France, son père, Sir Arnaud de Gaveston, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Clarmunda De Louvigny, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Clare le 1 novembre 1307, à Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 juin 1312, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterré à King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Piers Gaveston 1st Earl of Cornwall 1284 in Béarn, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Arnaud de Gaveston 37 und seine Mutter Lady Clarmunda De Louvigny 25. Er hat am 1. November 1307 in Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England Margaret de Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Juni 1312 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Warwick, Warwickshire, England und wurde in King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Piers Gaveston 1st Earl of Cornwall è nato il nel 1284 nel Béarn, Francia, il suo padre, Sir Arnaud de Gaveston, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Lady Clarmunda De Louvigny, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Clare il 1 novembre 1307, nel Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 19 giugno 1312, nel Warwick, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolto a King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Piers Gaveston 1st Earl of Cornwallが1284年にフランスブeアルンで生まれた時，父Sir Arnaud de Gavestonは37歳，母Lady Clarmunda De Louvignyは25歳であった。1307年11月1日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバークハムステドでMargaret de Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1312年6月19日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックで28歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアキング'ス ラングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Piers Gaveston 1st Earl of Cornwall(이)가 1284년 프랑스 브e아른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Arnaud de Gaveston(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Clarmunda De Louvigny(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1307년 11월 1일 영국 허트퍼드실르 버카스테드에서 Margaret de Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1312년 6월 19일 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 킨그'스 랭글리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Piers Gaveston 1st Earl of Cornwall nasceu em 1284, em Béarn, França, seu pai, Sir Arnaud de Gaveston, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Clarmunda De Louvigny, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Clare em 1 de novembro de 1307, em Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de junho de 1312, em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 28 anos, e foi sepultado em King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Piers Gaveston 1st Earl of Cornwall родился в 1284 г. в местности бeарн, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir Arnaud de Gaveston было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Clarmunda De Louvigny, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Clare 1 ноября 1307 г. в местности бирхамстед, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 19 июня 1312 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 28 лет и был похоронен в местности кинг'с лангли, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Piers Gaveston 1st Earl of Cornwall nació en 1284, en Béarn, Francia, su papá, Sir Arnaud de Gaveston, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Clarmunda De Louvigny, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret de Clare el 1 de noviembre de 1307, en Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 19 de junio de 1312, en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultado en King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
